title: マイルCS南部杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Mile Championship Nambu Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae is here, ready to run her first race
since July. In this race held in Tohoku, she carries
with her the hopes of her hometown Tomakomai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Copano Rickey's sincere efforts helped her
regain her courage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll go all out, even if she may be a bit rusty.
The two racers burn with fighting spirit ahead of
their long-awaited rematch.
